title: Web Design
coreConcepts: Visual hierarchy that directs users naturally to primary CTA points.
Custom Figma design systems using design tokens and auto-layouts.
Inclusive design complying with WCAG 2.1 accessibility contrast standards.
Mobile-first layouts to capture the dominant responsive search traffic.

painPoints.title: Generic Template Style
painPoints.desc: Pre-made templates fail to communicate brand credibility, looking identical to competitors.

painPoints.title: Confusing User Flows
painPoints.desc: Poor heading design and disorganized menus lead to high drop-offs on registration screens.

painPoints.title: Static Desktop Focus
painPoints.desc: Interfaces look clean on laptops but layout breaks on modern smartphone screens.

benefits.title: Bespoke Brand Identity
benefits.desc: 100% custom visual layouts reflecting your company's values, establishing authority.

benefits.title: Conversion-Rate Optimization
benefits.desc: Layouts mapped directly around customer actions, driving pipeline growth.

benefits.title: Smooth Developer Handovers
benefits.desc: Typesetting, layout variables, and asset directories clearly documented in Figma.

features.title: Interactive Figma Wireframes
features.desc: Click-through prototypes to validate user navigation before starting development.

features.title: Comprehensive Design Tokens
features.desc: Pre-defined typography scales, color grids, and border assets.

features.title: Responsive Layout Specifications
features.desc: Tailored mockups for desktop, tablet, and smartphone screens.

implementationProcess.title: Competitive Visual Research
implementationProcess.desc: Analyzing competitors' layouts and establishing a unique aesthetic direction.

implementationProcess.title: Information Architecture
implementationProcess.desc: Structuring page elements, visual hierarchies, and user paths.

implementationProcess.title: High-Fidelity UI Mockups
implementationProcess.desc: Applying custom typography scales, color grids, and interactive states.

implementationProcess.title: Handoff Specification
implementationProcess.desc: Packaging Figma variables and styling keys for code implementation.

deliverables: Vector branding assets and custom web icons
Contrast compliance and accessibility audit certificates

maintenance.title: Seasonal Graphics Updates
maintenance.desc: Refreshing promotional banners, illustration slides, and seasonal styles.

maintenance.title: Design System Scaling
maintenance.desc: Adding new layout states, buttons, and form inputs as features expand.

industryUseCases.case: Immersive visual resort grids highlighting room structures, facilities, and reservation CTAs.
Corporate advisory layouts that establish trust via premium typography and clean spacing.

commonObjections.objection: Why is custom design more expensive than buy-in themes?
commonObjections.answer: Themes look generic and limit your ability to stand out. Custom design aligns with your conversion paths, builds authentic credibility, and is crafted specifically to outrank template competitors.

commonMistakes: Ignoring text color contrast ratios, locking out visually impaired users.
Cluttering screens with too many overlapping CTAs, causing choice paralysis.
Designing pages without mobile layouts, causing alignment breaks on smartphones.

faqs.q: How many design revisions do you provide?
faqs.a: We provide up to 3 iterative feedback loops on wireframes and visual screens to guarantee the final layout matches your specifications.

faqs.q: Do we receive the original Figma files?
faqs.a: Yes, you own 100% of the Figma directories, tokens, and asset files upon project finalization.

glossary.definition: A centralized style variable (like a color hex code or font size) reused across the UI library.
A low-fidelity structural blueprint of page layouts, focusing on content placements.

ctaVariations.body: Ditch generic templates. Get a custom Figma design system mapped to your conversion metrics.

comparisonPoints.modern: Bespoke, high-end layouts tailored to brand guidelines

comparisonPoints.legacy: Layout elements warp or shrink on mobile screens
comparisonPoints.modern: Grid systems designed specifically for mobile-first views

pricingConsiderations: The total number of unique landing page screens and dashboard components required.
Complexity of custom illustration elements or dynamic interface animations.

timelineGuidance.phase: Figma design system mapping & high-fidelity screens
Prototype user testing & developer handoff files
